name: Valoe Oyj
summary: Valoe Oyj develops and sells solar energy technology products worldwide. The company offers automated production technology for solar modules; production lines for modules, solar modules, and special components for solar modules; and solar cells. It also provides one-sided interdigitated back contact (IBC) and bifacial IBC back contact modules; and solar power plants and systems. The company was formerly known as Cencorp Oyj and changed its name to Valoe Oyj in May 2015. Valoe Oyj was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Mikkeli, Finland.
